See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 25670 => 'Airtel', 25671 => 'UTL', 256720 => 'Smile', 256724 => 'Hamilton Telecom', 256726 => 'Tangerine', 256727 => 'Tangerine', 256728 => 'Talkio', 25673 => 'Hamilton Telecom', 25674 => 'Airtel', 25675 => 'Airtel', 25676 => 'MTN', 25677 => 'MTN', 25678 => 'MTN', 25679 => 'Africell', ];
